title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kirloskar Electric - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kirloskar Electric - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
